title: No Underleveled Evolutions [Cobblemon]
description: Add-on for Cobblemon that prevents evolved Pokemon from spawning below their level up requirement.
body:
A simple mod that checks if an evolved Pokemon is spawning, and cancels the spawn if its level is lower than what that Pokemon normally evolves at.

Particularly useful with mods that change the spawning level of Pokemon, such as [Cobblemon: Cobbled Levels.](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-cobbled-levels)

I noticed when cobbled levels is install it was possible to encounter level 1 fully evolved Pokemon.

This mod hooks into the base Cobblemon events, so it should be compatible with all Cobblemon mods.
